mapper.select: SELECT id, chart_name, chart_code, chart_type, data_source_id, sql_content, chart_config, description, status, mobile_enabled, allow_export_excel, allow_export_pdf, watermark_type, pdf_watermark, create_by, create_time, update_time FROM chart_definition WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, chart_name, chart_code, chart_type, data_source_id, sql_content, chart_config, description, status, mobile_enabled, allow_export_excel, allow_export_pdf, watermark_type, pdf_watermark, create_by, create_time, update_time FROM chart_definition WHERE chart_code = #{chartCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chart_definition (chart_name, chart_code, chart_type, data_source_id, sql_content, chart_config, description, status, allow_export_excel, allow_export_pdf, watermark_type, pdf_watermark, create_by, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{chartName}, #{chartCode}, #{chartType}, #{dataSourceId}, #{sqlContent}, #{chartConfig}, #{description}, #{status}, #{allowExportExcel}, #{allowExportPdf}, #{watermarkType}, #{pdfWatermark}, #{createBy}, NOW(), NOW())
